approaches.title: Unordered two-pointer removal
approaches.summary: Scans from the front and replaces matching elements with values from the back, allowing element order to change.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Uses a front pointer and back pointer to overwrite removed values and return the remaining length.

approaches.title: Stable direct overwrite
approaches.summary: Scans the array once and compacts all non-matching elements into the front, preserving their relative order.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces the swap-based scan with a direct overwrite using an enhanced for-loop.
